select_when: A favored framework might be hiding reality by shaping attention too aggressively and filtering out inconvenient evidence.
Different models yield materially different cuts of the problem, suggesting the current map is narrowing what the team can notice.
Progress depends on reframing to uncover missing signal that the dominant theory is causing everyone not to notice.
Experts are defaulting to familiar intellectual routines instead of tailoring their approach to the novelty of the problem.
avoid_when: Reframing has turned into endless theory shopping that avoids evidence, testable claims, or operational decisions.
The team is treating the map as the territory and using a familiar framework to torture reality into fit.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on framework-caused blind spots, reframing discipline, and anti-map-is-territory correction rather than on generic open-mindedness rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor philosophy sprawl because the raw source is stronger on multiple cuts, multidisciplinary review, and anti-theory-shopping discipline.
Did not add higher-order fields because this batch stays inside the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The typed fields compress a source that spans expert overconfidence, communication blind spots, and problem-framing error.

select_when.note: The raw strengths section is explicit on favored frameworks hiding reality, materially different cuts, and reframing to uncover missing signal.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are directly supported by the source warnings on endless theory shopping and forcing reality to fit the map.

input_type.note: The raw source activates on interpretation distorted by dominant frameworks, but the compact input label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The source yields reframing and skepticism against current maps; the output label compresses that into a typed challenge artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Theory-induced-blindness clearly uses reflective and diagnostic reasoning, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
